Watch your scores trend upward over time." }, ]; const scenarios = [ { label: "Thesis Defense", emoji: "🎓", color: "#7c6cfc" }, { label: "Job Interview", emoji: "💼", color: "#fc6c8f" }, { label: "Recitation", emoji: "📖", color: "#4ecca3" }, ]; export default function LandingPage({ navigate, user, onLogout }) { return (
